payload.input: They throw open the closet doors to find Julian leaning against the back wall with his trousers around his ankles, Vivian on her knees before him, her mouth glossy, her camisole stained. "You perfect little liars," Julian groans, his hand fisting in Vivian’s hair, his eyes never leaving Maya’s face. "Get over here. We have three hours to teach you everything the Bible forgot."
